languages.text: Ось подъемного крана покрыта ржавчиной, но редукторы двигаются плавно. Механизмы внутри поворотной платформы сделаны из странного черного сплава.

traits.locale_text: Ось подъемного крана покрыта ржавчиной, но редукторы двигаются плавно. Механизмы внутри поворотной платформы сделаны из странного черного сплава.

languages.text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.
languages.original_text: Ось подъемного крана покрыта ржавчиной, но редукторы двигаются плавно. Механизмы внутри поворотной платформы сделаны из странного черного сплава.

traits.locale_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.
The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.
The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly, as if new. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.
The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.
The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

languages.text: 起重机的轮轴锈迹斑斑，可齿轮却运行流畅。转盘内部的机械结构由一种奇怪的黑色合金打造而成。
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: 起重机的轮轴锈迹斑斑，可齿轮却运行流畅。转盘内部的机械结构由一种奇怪的黑色合金打造而成。

languages.text: El eje de la grúa está cubierto de óxido, pero los engranajes se mueven con suavidad. Los mecanismos del interior de la base giratoria están forjados con una extraña aleación negra.
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: El eje de la grúa está cubierto de óxido, pero los engranajes se mueven con suavidad. Los mecanismos del interior de la base giratoria están forjados con una extraña aleación negra.

languages.text: L'essieu est rouillé, mais le mécanisme s'actionne avec fluidité. Les mécanismes à l'intérieur du plateau sont composés d'un étrange alliage noir.
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: L'essieu est rouillé, mais le mécanisme s'actionne avec fluidité. Les mécanismes à l'intérieur du plateau sont composés d'un étrange alliage noir.

languages.text: Vincin mili pasla kaplı ancak dişliler pürüzsüzce hareket ediyor. Döner tablanın içindeki mekanizmalar tuhaf, siyah bir alaşımdan yapılmış.
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: Vincin mili pasla kaplı ancak dişliler pürüzsüzce hareket ediyor. Döner tablanın içindeki mekanizmalar tuhaf, siyah bir alaşımdan yapılmış.

languages.text: Der Kran ist rostig, aber sein Getriebe läuft reibungslos. Die Mechanismen im Inneren der Drehscheibe bestehen aus einer seltsamen schwarzen Legierung.
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: Der Kran ist rostig, aber sein Getriebe läuft reibungslos. Die Mechanismen im Inneren der Drehscheibe bestehen aus einer seltsamen schwarzen Legierung.

languages.text: クレーンのアクスルは錆び付いているが、歯車はスムーズに動く。ターンテーブル内部の機構は、奇妙な黒色の合金でできている。
languages.original_text: The crane axle is covered in rust, but the gears move smoothly. The mechanisms inside the turntable are made of a strange black alloy.

traits.locale_text: クレーンのアクスルは錆び付いているが、歯車はスムーズに動く。ターンテーブル内部の機構は、奇妙な黒色の合金でできている。
